title: Aliens Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Aliens Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aliens Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Property Advisor to strengthen our Ghaziabad-based team.

About Aliens Group:
Aliens Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aliens Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
